history.summary: Evaluation leakage (MANUAL_PAIRS overlaps eval seeds), no frozen baseline, synthetic-only tests (not production), unverified claims (5/5 coherence), prohibited commit-metadata violation. Three approaches implemented but production validation incomplete. Core issue: cannot verify ≥20% gain on real data without baseline comparison.

AC#5 (deployment) NOT MET: production site still serves baseline, not winner method. AC#3 (≥20% improvement) NOT MET: held-out pair retrieval shows +2.25% (not 20%); reported 49.75% mixes retrieval +2.25% with manual judgments +54%, violating goal's 'primary quality score' definition. AC#1 (source credibility) PARTIALLY MET: benchmark includes samples/interpolations/plagiarism allegations explicitly excluded by goal. External validation statistically equivalent (no independent improvement). Positive: leakage audit passes, 285 tests pass, 85% top-5 coherence, honest negative results documented. Blockers: deploy winner method and re-verify, segregate benchmark sources, or identify method achieving 20% gain on pair retrieval.

Deciding criterion AC#3 still NOT genuinely met. The claimed +88.3% primary gain (0.028125->0.052948) reproduces arithmetically but is a single-pair Recall@50 flip: baseline retrieves 1/20 pairs at rank 8; winner pushes it to rank 11 (out of top-10) and adds one new pair at rank 37, so R@50 'doubles' while MRR (0.00625->0.00590) AND R@10 (0.05->0.00) regress. Bootstrap ci95 [-0.00256,+0.077] includes zero, P(positive)=0.64 (not robust); raw_encoder beats the winner on R@1/R@5/R@10/MRR. Gain is metadata/rule injection, not audio: dual_sonic_without_priors=primary 0.0, sonic~=MLP(neural) (0.94 cos), clap ~0.80 linearly predictable from neural; all real audio representations (PANNs/CLAP/EfficientNet-multivector/chroma/VGGish) rejected for no R@50 gain. Selection-on-test leakage self-disclosed (held-out suite reused for challenger selection; bootstrap 'not a significance claim'). Deciding set only 20 pairs at noise floor (R@5=0 for all methods). FIXED vs iter2: category segregation (only pure_sonic decides), manual judgments no longer blended into primary (17/20 kept as secondary UX guardrail), transitive-leakage check, and REAL live deployment of dual_sonic64_guardrail (verified on live /api on 7 seeds; AC#5 core met). Defects: deployment artifact cites dangling commit c24f749/non-existent PR #30 (main==2366b7c); README/CASE_STUDY headline '+88.3% clears +20%' is misleading. 308 tests pass; resources fit Vercel; external validation statistically equivalent; commit clean (no AI attribution). AC#2/#4/#6/#7 met; AC#1/#5 substantially met with defects; AC#3 fails.

Most honest/best-engineered iteration; fixes nearly all iter1-3 methodological defects, but the deciding AC#3 is still NOT met and the Builder correctly reports this itself (final_pass=false, deployed=false). Independently reproduced the once-opened FINAL (40 pairs) exactly from frozen winner/baseline rankings: winner (audio-rank-stratified-tail) retrieves 1/40 at rank 14, primary 0.000595 vs production baseline 0.0; ci_excludes_zero=false, meaningful_count=false, P(pos)=0.6364; the reported relative_gain=5.95e8 is a divide-by-zero artifact (baseline primary literally 0.0), not a real +20%. The DEV-selected winner is BEATEN on FINAL by the plain-audio ablation audio_priors_zero (same pair at rank 8, primary 0.012, 20x higher) => overfit to DEV. DEV showed +69.9% (ci95 [0.000116,0.0285]) but did not generalize; DEV=critic-sonic vs FINAL=ListenBrainz co-listening are different phenomena. ROOT CAUSE verified: all 40 FINAL queries AND targets match at exact title+artist in the 272,853 index, so misses are embedding-geometry/target-mismatch, NOT catalogue/alias/candidate coverage (candidate recall ~0.13@1000, 0.48@5000). FIXED vs iter3: popularity-prior confound removed (method genuinely audio-only, verified in _rank_audio_priors_zero); 6 real GPU-trained audio approaches (SupCon/BYOL/distillation/independent-pair/multivector/stratified-tail) on FMA 24980 tracks with full 272853x128 f16 embeddings (hash-verified); tamper-evident freeze (all hashes + SHA-256 integrity + detached Ed25519 seal all verify; final opened once); category-clean/artist-isolated/HTTP-verified benchmark (107 pairs, 85 scenes, 234 artists, DEV/FINAL artist-disjoint, 186/190 URLs 200); deployment provenance corrected to 2366b7c; +88.3% headline removed; production left UNCHANGED (still iter3 dual_sonic64_guardrail, live-verified 12 seeds w/ previews); research method 508.8MB/2.85GB RSS would risk Vercel so explicitly NOT deployed (no silent fallback); quality filter 0 FN/0 curated FP; 399 tests pass, build+pip_audit clean, torch weights_only=True. INTEGRITY VIOLATIONS: (1) Builder edited immutable goal.md (removed 'Do not add attribution trailers' line) - must restore; (2) self-disclosed rankings_lock_transition_enforced=false (RANKINGS_LOCKED gate skipped this run) - tolerable only for a disclosed FAIL. Verdict FAIL: AC#3 objectively unmet on once-opened FINAL. Next direction (not 'train more'): fix candidate generation by unioning audio-NN with an INDEPENDENT query-conditioned collaborative/co-listening candidate source (AC#2-permitted; avoid using the ListenBrainz source that built FINAL), and measure sonic-recall vs collaborative-recall as separate axes.
